subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the blessed Lote-Tree! Though numerous letters have hitherto been dispatched [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره المبارکه هر چند مکاتیب متعدده تا بحال ارسال گشته
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
